name: Biconomy
description: Account abstraction SDK providing gasless transactions, session keys, batching and a paymaster/bundler infrastructure for dApps.

seo.title: Biconomy — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Biconomy: Account abstraction SDK providing gasless transactions, session keys, batching and a paymaster/bundler infrastructure for dApps.

when_to_use: Gasless transactions for Web3 apps using account abstraction
Session keys for frictionless in-game asset interactions
Bundling multiple on-chain calls into one user transaction
ERC-4337 paymaster infrastructure for NFT minting without gas
Simplifying Web3 onboarding by eliminating crypto gas UX

cons: Account abstraction still early on some chains
Fees stack on top of gas
review.verdict: The easiest way to ship gasless UX today, at the cost of tying your dApp to their infra.
review.best_for: Consumer dApps that need smooth onboarding and gasless flows
review.not_for: Protocols prioritizing fully self-hosted, trust-minimized infra
